channel.title: Demand on Ethan Ligon
channel.description: Recent content in Demand on Ethan Ligon

item.title: Consumer Demand with Price Aggregators and Low-Rank Cross-Price Effects
item.description: Characterizes preferences that rationalize demand systems with price aggregators, providing flexible and tractable forms for estimating consumer demand with many goods.

item.title: Consumption Subaggregates Should Not Be Used to Measure Poverty
item.description: Shows that using consumption subaggregates to measure poverty is theoretically unjustified and empirically misleading.

item.title: Inferring Informal Risk-Sharing Regimes: Evidence from Rural Tanzania
item.description: Exploits the link between interest rates and consumption moments to test alternative risk-sharing models without interest rate data.

item.title: All -Separable Demands and Rationalizing Utility Functions
item.description: Completely characterizes all Frisch demand systems that are separable in the budget-constraint multiplier, and the utility functions that rationalize them.

item.title: Some -Separable Frisch Demands with Utility Functions
item.description: Provides closed-form utility functions for several families of lambda-separable Frisch demands used in applied work.
